features.name: Product Gallery with Zoom
features.description: Thumbnail strip, hover lens zoom on desktop, immersive lightbox with pan-to-zoom on click

features.name: Quick View Modal
features.description: Product preview popup with image, variants, quantity selector, and add-to-cart — no page load needed

features.name: Quick Add to Cart
features.description: One-click add-to-cart button directly from the product grid — skip the detail page

features.name: Variant Picker
features.description: Interactive size button group (XS–XXL) and color swatches with visual selection ring

features.name: Sticky Add to Cart
features.description: Fixed bottom bar appears on scroll with product title, price, and add-to-cart button

features.name: Frequently Bought Together
features.description: Smart product bundling section with checkbox selection and combined add-to-cart

features.name: Stock Counter
features.description: Low-stock urgency indicator that shows remaining inventory below a threshold

features.name: Trust Badges
features.description: Security and satisfaction badges (free shipping, secure checkout, easy returns) below add-to-cart

features.name: Hover Image Swap
features.description: Product cards show alternate image on hover for a quick second look

features.name: Product Video Support
features.description: Embed product videos in the gallery alongside standard images
features.hint: Add a videoUrl field to any product in products.json

features.name: Slide-in Cart Drawer
features.description: Full-featured side panel with item list, quantity controls, subtotal, and checkout link

features.name: Free Shipping Progress Bar
features.description: Animated progress bar showing how close you are to free shipping ($99 threshold)

features.name: Cart Upsells
features.description: Recommended products inside the cart drawer to increase average order value

features.name: Promo Code Input
features.description: Apply discount codes at cart level with success and error feedback states

features.name: Order Notes
features.description: Optional text area for customers to add delivery instructions or gift notes

features.name: Multi-Step Checkout
features.description: Clean 3-step flow: shipping, payment, review — all on one page with step indicator

features.name: Live Search with Autocomplete
features.description: Instant product search results with thumbnails, prices, and keyboard navigation

features.name: Mega-Menu Navigation
features.description: Multi-column dropdown with category links, trending products, and featured promo banner
features.hint: Hover over 'Women' in the main navigation

features.name: Mobile Menu
features.description: Full-screen slide-in panel with accordion sections, search, account links, and language switcher
features.hint: Resize to mobile and tap the hamburger icon

features.name: Breadcrumbs
features.description: Full navigation trail with category hierarchy support on every interior page

features.name: Mobile Bottom Navigation
features.description: Fixed bottom bar with home, categories, search, wishlist, and cart — mobile-only
features.hint: Resize to mobile to see the bottom nav bar

features.name: Back to Top Button
features.description: Smooth-scroll floating button that appears after scrolling down the page
features.hint: Scroll down on any page to see it appear

features.name: Filter Sidebar
features.description: Category checkboxes, price range inputs, size buttons, color swatches, and in-stock toggle

features.name: Sort Dropdown
features.description: Sort by featured, price (low/high), newest, or best rated with instant results

features.name: Grid / List Toggle
features.description: Switch between grid view and list view with persistent preference

features.name: Load More Pagination
features.description: Progressive loading with animated load-more button and page number navigation

features.name: Category Pages
features.description: Dedicated browse pages for each category with hero banner and filtered product grid

features.name: Recently Viewed
features.description: localStorage-powered horizontal scroll strip of previously viewed products

features.name: Product Compare
features.description: Side-by-side comparison table for up to 4 products with specs, pricing, and ratings

features.name: Product Reviews
features.description: Star rating, written reviews, rating distribution chart, and helpful vote buttons

features.name: Review Submission Form
features.description: Full review form with star picker, title, body, pros/cons, and recommendation toggle

features.name: Star Ratings
features.description: SVG star display with filled, half, and empty states — used on cards and detail pages

features.name: Social Sharing
features.description: Share product and blog pages via Twitter, Facebook, Pinterest, and email

features.name: Customer Testimonials
features.description: Review cards with star ratings, customer names, and purchased product references
features.hint: Scroll to the testimonials section on the homepage

features.name: Blog with MDX Support
features.description: Content Collections powered blog with markdown and MDX for rich interactive posts

features.name: Blog Sidebar
features.description: Categories, recent posts, tags cloud, and newsletter signup in the blog listing

features.name: Blog Categories
features.description: Filter posts by category with dedicated category listing views

features.name: Tags Cloud
features.description: Visual tag cloud with sized tags based on frequency for topic discovery

features.name: 6 Sample Blog Posts
features.description: Realistic fashion content covering capsule wardrobes, layering, sustainability, and more

features.name: Lookbook Gallery
features.description: Visual storytelling page with styled outfits and shop-the-look product links

features.name: RTL Layout Support
features.description: Full right-to-left layout with logical CSS properties — every component mirrors correctly

features.name: 3-Language i18n
features.description: Built-in translations for English, Spanish, and Arabic with easy extensibility

features.name: Language Switcher
features.description: Globe icon dropdown in the header to switch languages and text direction instantly

features.name: Logical CSS Properties
features.description: Uses start/end instead of left/right throughout — ensures correct RTL rendering

features.name: Dark Mode
features.description: Toggle between light and dark themes — every element intentionally designed for both

features.name: Newsletter Popup
features.description: Timed popup with email capture, 15% off incentive, and dismissable state

features.name: Sale Countdown Timer
features.description: Animated countdown with days, hours, minutes, seconds on a vibrant gradient banner

features.name: Fully Responsive
features.description: Pixel-perfect at 320px, 768px, 1024px, and 1440px — mobile-first approach
features.hint: Resize the browser to see responsive breakpoints

features.name: SEO Optimized
features.description: Meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter cards, JSON-LD structured data, sitemap, and robots.txt
features.hint: View page source to see meta tags and JSON-LD

features.name: View Transitions
features.description: Smooth page-to-page transitions powered by Astro's ClientRouter

features.name: Self-Hosted Fonts
features.description: Outfit and Inter variable fonts loaded locally — no external CDN requests
features.hint: Zero external font requests for maximum performance

features.name: Announcement Bar
features.description: Dismissible gradient top bar with promotional message and link

features.name: Micro-Interactions
features.description: Hover scales, gradient shifts, shadow lifts, and smooth transitions throughout
